summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now tracks as the morning after chapter 14 without implying the paddleboards have been dripping all night, and the closing beat now carries the spray residue forward into chapter 16's morning aftermath.
edits: Reworded the opening image so the paddleboards are damp and creek-streaked rather than still dripping the next morning.
Added a brief final residue beat on the rails to hand off more cleanly into chapter 16's chemical aftermath.
